description: Birth chart record. Birth data plus astrological placements. key: 'tid' — users can hold multiple (Western, Jyotish, rectified versions). Birth date and time are PII; see PRIVACY.md for encryption guidance.

coordinate.description: Geographic coordinate as decimal degree strings (no floats per ATProto spec).

placeName.description: Human-readable place name, e.g. 'Oakland, CA, USA'.

longitude.description: Ecliptic longitude as decimal degree string, e.g. '254.378500'.

isRetrograde.description: True if the body is retrograde.

isCombust.description: True if the body is combust (Jyotish).

longitude.description: Ecliptic longitude of the cusp as decimal degree string.

ascendant.description: Ascendant degree as decimal degree string.

midheaven.description: Midheaven (MC) degree as decimal degree string.

extensions.description: Extension point for tradition-specific fields not yet in spec (e.g., Hellenistic lots, Uranian midpoints).

ayanamsaDegrees.description: Ayanamsa value at birth as decimal degree string.

ascendant.description: Lagna degree as decimal degree string.

vargaCharts.description: Divisional chart data (D-2, D-9, D-10, etc.).

extensions.description: Extension point for tradition-specific fields (e.g., shadbala scores, ashtakavarga).

record.description: Natal chart record. Birth data + astrological placements. Users may hold multiple records (Western, Jyotish, rectified). Birth datetime is PII — see PRIVACY.md.

schemaVersion.description: Schema version. Breaking changes increment to 2.0.0 in a new lexicon file; old records remain valid under old readers.

traditions.description: Astrological traditions represented in this record, e.g. ['western', 'jyotish']. One record can carry multiple traditions simultaneously.

birthDatetime.description: Birth date and time (ISO 8601). Optional — omit if unknown. For privacy, consider encrypting as JWE before posting if visibility='private'. See PRIVACY.md for implementation guidance.

birthTimeTrust.description: Confidence level of birth time. 'exact' = birth certificate or hospital record, 'approximate' = family memory or close estimate, 'unknown' = time not available.

timeConfidence.description: Reliability of birth time. 'exact' = birth certificate, 'approximate' = family memory, 'unknown' = date known time not, 'rectified' = time derived by rectification (see rectificationNote).

rectificationNote.description: Explanation of the rectification method used, if timeConfidence='rectified'.

roddenRating.description: Rodden Rating for source reliability (Western tradition). AA = birth certificate, X = unknown.

subjectDid.description: AT Protocol DID of the person whose chart this is. Optional — linking a DID to a chart requires explicit consent. Can be self-referential (user posting their own chart).

attestedBy.description: Array of DIDs of astrologers who have attested to this chart's accuracy. Each attesting DID is expected to publish a corresponding space.chartid.chartVerification record.

visibility.description: Who can see this chart. 'public' = anyone on ATProto. 'private' = only the DID owner (use encryptedData for stronger protection). 'friends' = social graph access (future feature).

encryptedData.description: Optional JWE-encrypted birthDatetime for private charts. When present, birthDatetime should be omitted or set to a date-only value. See PRIVACY.md for implementation.

extensions.description: Extension point for fields not yet in spec. Tradition-specific extras go in western.extensions or jyotish.extensions.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this record was created (ISO 8601).
